full_text:
Lady Pan 潘夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Pan (潘夫人)was born in Juzhang in Guiji. Wife of Sun Quan, the Lord of Wu. Was a native of Juzhang in Kuaiji. Lady Pan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lady Pan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
